Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Form Interrogatories And Requests For Admission From Defendant Teo Llc
Off Calendar Feb-17-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):

Atty Michael Vroman, Esq. of TENANT LAW GROUP, PC (Tele: 415-888-510-7511) for Plaintiffs, appearing out of abundance of caution.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF SF GOOD LLC Motion To Compel Further Responses To Form Interrogatories And Requests For Admission From Defendant Teo LLC

Plaintiff stipulates to matter heard by Judge Pro Tem.

The Court adopts its tentative ruling:

PLAINTIFF SF GOOD LLC'S (HEREAFTER EITHER "PLAINTIFF" OR "SF GOOD") UNOPPOSED MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES ANDREQUESTS FOR ADMISSION IS GRANTED AS FOLLOWS:
(1) WITHIN THIRTY (30) CALENDAR DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER, DEFENDANT TEO, LLC (HEREAFTER EITHER "DEFENDANT" OR "TEO") WILL DELIVER TO PLAINTIFF WITHOUT OBJECTION VERIFIED CODE COMPLIANT RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES NOS. 8.3, 8.4, 8.5, 8.6,8.7 & 8.8. DEFENDANT'S OBJECTIONS TO THESE INTERROGATORIES ARE OVERRULED.
(2) WITHIN THIRTY (30) CALENDAR DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER, DEFENDANT WILL DELIVER TO PLAINTIFF WITHOUT OBJECTION, CODE COMPLIANT RESPONSES TO REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION NOS 1, 4, 5, 6, 12,14, 16 & 17. DEFENDANTS OBJECTIONS TO THESE REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION ARE OVERRULED.
(3) NO MONETARY SANCTIONS WERE SOUGHT, NONE WILL BE IMPOSED.
CONSEL FOR PLAINTIFF SHOULD PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER CONSISTENT WITH THIS TENTATIVE RULING, SUBMIT IT TO COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANT AND DELIVER A COPY IN WORDFORM TO THE COURT (rennepar85@gmail.com.) IN ADVANCE OF THE HEARING ON FEBRUARY 17, 2023.

Order signed after hearing.

Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne; Clerk: R. Sahatjian; Not Reported. =(302/JPT)
